summarization.a: The line chart shows the energy change over time at different temperatures.
summarization.b: The figure shows the trajectory of the F atoms on the surface plane at 100 K.
summarization.c: The figure shows the trajectory of the F atoms on the surface plane at 300 K.
summarization.d: The figure shows the trajectory of the F atoms on the surface plane at 500 K.
summarization.e: The figure shows the trajectory of the F atoms on the surface plane at 1000 K.
summarization.f: The figure shows the final surface composition.

a.questions: How many groups are present in the unit cell?
a.answer: 24 SF groups in the unit cell.

a.questions: How does the energy change over the time?
a.answer: As the simulation time increases, so does the energy of the system.

a.questions: At what temperature is the system's energy higher?
Why does the energy of the system decrease at 300 K?
a.answer: The decrease in energy is due to the formation of two SF2 groups.
